# Kirka Community Hub
> Hub for Kirka.io customizations and community resources.

## Core Resources
- Assets: /assets.html (Scripts, Skyboxes, Kill Icons, and Sounds)
- CSS Themes: /css.html (Free and paid themes for Kirka)
- Crosshairs: /crosshairs.html (crosshair overlays)
- Maps: /maps.html (custom & community maps)
- Textures: /textures.html (Custom map textures)
- Clients: /clients.html  (game clients for kirka)

## Community & Tools
- Tools: / (Includes links to all kirka util webpages)
- Social: /social.html (Discord community for scrims)
- Submission: /submit-content.html (Community contribution portal)
- Contribution: /contribution.html (Guide to contributing to KCH)
- Legal: /tos.html (Terms of Service) and /report.html (Report issues)

## Developer
- API Reference: /api.html (Public API for all KCH data – CSS themes, crosshairs, textures, clients, scripts, skyboxes, sounds, maps, and kill icons)
